_comment: Floors updated 2026-07-19 from the first 5090 fleet scan (221-229 TFLOPS, 396-427 MB/s disk, 16-18 GB/s H2D measured healthy). Hardware keys are broken-hardware floors valid for 5090/6000/B200 profiles. Network keys: drive_pull_mbps gates the rclone->Drive boot path (80 = 10 MB/s), download_mbps the generic path; during the 2026-07-19 network event all US mid-band hosts measured 9-20 mbps on BOTH — the gate correctly blocks launches there until it clears. download_mbps relaxed 200->120 (2026-07-19 evening): the 200 floor was calibrated for 25 GB HF-era pulls; bank-boot runs move ~2.4 GiB via Drive + ~100 MB generic, and 120 still blocks the event signature (9-20) six times over. A healthy HK host (m144349: 161 down, 86 drive, 221 TFLOPS) was rejected by the old floor.
